title: Framework correctness implies agent recreatability
statement: The test of framework correctness: can any agent be written against the framework purely by authoring an agent spec YAML + a template + optionally an output schema + a capability declaration — with no framework code changes? If a new agent requires touching framework code, the framework is insufficiently generalized.
rationale: Recreatability is the operational definition of canonical framework. If specs are durable artifacts, the framework is leaking implementation into the consumer surface.
